steps.t: The missing items from Thane Pendrad can likely be found among the fields of Orcs to the north and west of Elthengels. You have found the late Thane P…
Thane Mildrith awaits you at the Elthengels Mead Hall, on the eastern edge of the Norcrofts. You have recovered the lost items of the late Thane Pendr…
